tenant.errors.forbidden.title: 403 - Access Forbidden
tenant.errors.forbidden.message_default: You do not have permission to access this page.
tenant.errors.forbidden.help: Contact tenant owner/admin if you need access to this module.
tenant.errors.upgrade.title: Feature Locked by Subscription
tenant.errors.upgrade.message: Module {{module}} is not available on your current plan.
tenant.errors.upgrade.help: Contact platform admin to upgrade this tenant subscription.
tenant.errors.access_required.title: Tenant Access Required
tenant.errors.access_required.message: Your account is not connected to an active tenant. Contact platform admin for access.
tenant.errors.access_required.help: After membership is granted, you can access the tenant workspace directly.
